exclusions.reason: Root-level runtime visibility CLI is exercised by scripts/test-work-suite-runtime-audit.cjs and validate-skills freshness checks outside the Desk MCP coverage runner.

Root-level skill + manifest validation CLI is exercised directly by the 'Validate skills' CI job (`node scripts/validate-skills.cjs`) and its dedicated unit test; its CLI/error-exit branches run outside the Desk MCP coverage runner, mirroring scripts/audit-work-suite-runtime.cjs.
